title: pedilonum petiolatum
intro: Pedilonum petiolatum, also known as the 'Cocklebur', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. The herbal preparation of Pedilonum petiolatum can be used in various forms, including infusions, tinctures, and poultices.
